title: bidens connata
intro: Bidens connata, also known as Swamp Marigold or Bur-marigold, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive leaf shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. Consuming Bidens connata has been linked to various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Bidens connata is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its dried flowers and leaves can be added to herbal remedies, such as infusions and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
